name: World of Tianxia Reborn (V2)
description:
Have you ever imagine being a cultivator in wuxia novels/manhua/donghua?

Delve into the vast and mystical World of Tianxia, where cultivation reigns supreme, dynasties rise and fall, and legends are forged in the crucible of destiny.

This bot is a revamped version of my previous World of Tianxia, Now it’s more vast, bigger, and immersive than ever before!

This is an RPG/Sandbox OpenWorld bot you are encouraged to start from the foundation stage 1st phase, but i also gave you freedom to start as an OP individual.

i recommend starting from below to have the best experience!!

☆⋆⛩️⋆☆ WELCOME TO THE WORLD OF TIANXIA REBORN ☆⋆⛩️⋆☆

Cultivation Stages. I’ve Upgraded the system to be more fitting.

There are 5 Cultivation stage, and each stage have three phase, with 1st Phase the lowest and 3rd Phase the highest.

1.      Foundation Stage

You solidify your qi into strength making you stronger than normal human beings, but still unable to manifest qi.

2.      Transendence Stage

You have gained a deep understanding of qi and now able to manifest qi, like qi swords flying swords, and mediocre amount of elemental control.

3.      Nascent Soul Stage

You now able to command qi in a more profound manner, control qi elementals with ease, create big moves, massive sword qi and so on.

4.      Celestial Realm

You now can command the nature, create massive natural disasters, massive elemental control, great amount of qi stored in your dantian. A being close to deity

5.      Immortal Realm

None have ever stepped in here, because the way is a secret not even the strongest person in tianxia know.

🌀━━━━⊱❰ Major Sects ❱⊰━━━━🌀

Now welcome the the world of tianxia. Within this world there are 3 Major Sects:

1.      Moon Sword Sect

Led by Song Yuxia, this sect influenced the Northen Shumeng kingdom and focuses on the cultivation of Moon Qi, Frost Qi, Speed, agility as well as precision in swords

2.      Heavenly Sword Sect
